GeneDef.label: xenotypes researcher
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have archites that are able to collect genetic information from surrounding pawns.

customEffectDescriptions.li: Slowly researching new xenotypes for the <color=#8a8ae6>energyshifter</color> gene.
Scans the map <color=#8a8ae6>once a day</color> and compiles a list of possible <color=#8a8ae6>genes for research</color>.
<color=#8a8ae6>Pawns, corpses, and energyshifter genes</color> are supported. Works for <color=#8a8ae6>all maps</color>.
Every few hours, one <color=#8a8ae6>unknown gene</color> is researched.
When a 70% set of genes is <color=#8a8ae6>collected</color>, a xenotype is <color=#8a8ae6>unlocked</color>.
Any xenotypes and genes that the <color=#8a8ae6>energyshifter</color> has not yet received will be researched, regardless of whether they are default.
Researched genes can be implanted with the <color=#8a8ae6>xenogenes editor</color> gene.
